heading: Enlisted members and warrant officers appointed as officers: pay and allowances stabilized
label: 907 Enlisted members and warrant officers appointed as officers: pay and allowances stabilized

(a), (b). , substituted “the officer” for “he” wherever appearing and “the appointment” for “his appointment” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 109–163, § 686(b)(1)Subsec. (c)(2). , substituted “the officer remained” for “he remained”.Pub. L. 109–163, § 686(b)(2)Subsec. (d). , amended subsec. (d) generally. Prior to amendment, subsec. (d) read as follows: “In determining the amount of the pay and allowances of a grade formerly held by an officer, incentive pay for hazardous duty under , special pay for diving duty under , for hardship duty under , and for sea duty under , and proficiency pay under may be considered only so long as the officer continues to perform the duty creating the entitlement to or eligibility for that pay and would otherwise be eligible to receive that pay in his former grade.”Pub. L. 109–163, § 686(a)section 301 of this titlesection 304 of this titlesection 305 of this titlesection 305a of this titlesection 307 of this title1998—Subsec. (d). substituted “hardship duty” for “duty at a hardship duty location”.Pub. L. 105–2611997—Subsec. (d). substituted “duty at a hardship duty location” for “duty at certain places”.Pub. L. 105–851991—Subsec. (c)(1). struck out “of this section” after “subsection (d)” in subpar. (A) and after “subsection (e)” in subpar. (B).Pub. L. 102–251980— substituted “and warrant officers appointed as officers:” for “appointed as officers;” in section catchline, and, in generally revising section, struck out provision for temporary appointment of enlisted members as officers, provided for pay and allowances for warrant officers who accept appointment as commissioned officers, and specified what pay and allowances include and what rates and allowances of a grade which an officer formerly held are for purposes of this section.Pub. L. 96–343

A, title VI, § 686(c)119 Stat. 3326Jan. 6, 2006“Subsection (d) of , United States Code, as amended by subsection (a), shall apply with respect to any acceptance by an enlisted member of the Armed Forces of an appointment as an officer made on or after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”section 907 of title 37Jan. 6, 2006

children.text: the pay and allowances to which the officer is entitled as an officer; or
the pay and allowances to which the officer would be entitled if the officer were in the last enlisted grade the officer held before the appointment as an officer.
the pay and allowances to which the officer is entitled as such a commissioned officer;
the pay and allowances to which the officer would be entitled if the officer were in the last warrant officer grade the officer held before the appointment as such a commissioned officer; or

in the case of an officer who was formerly an enlisted member, the pay and allowances to which the officer would be entitled if the officer were in the last enlisted grade the officer held before the appointment as an officer.

children.label: A
children.text: subject to subsection (d), special and incentive pays under chapter 5 of this title; and

children.label: B
children.text: subject to subsection (e), allowances under chapter 7 of this title; and

the rates of pay and allowances of a grade which an officer formerly held are those to which the officer would have been entitled had the officer remained in that grade and continued to receive the increases in pay and allowances authorized for that grade, as otherwise provided in this title.

children.label: A
children.text: Incentive pay for hazardous duty under section 301 or 351 of this title.

children.label: B
children.text: Submarine duty incentive pay under section 301c or 352 of this title.

children.label: C
children.text: Special pay for diving duty under section 304 or 353(a) of this title.

children.label: D
children.text: Hardship duty pay under section 305 or 352 of this title.

children.label: E
children.text: Career sea pay under section 305a or 352 of this title.

children.label: F
children.text: Special pay for service as a member of a Weapons of Mass Destruction Civil Support Team under section 305b or 352 of this title.

children.label: G
children.text: Assignment incentive pay under section 307a or 352 of this title.

children.label: H
children.text: Special pay for duty subject to hostile fire or imminent danger under section 310 or 351 of this title.

children.label: I
children.text: Special pay or bonus for an extension of duty at a designated overseas location under section 314 or 352 of this title.

children.label: J
children.text: Foreign language proficiency pay under .section 353(b) of this title

children.label: K
children.text: Critical skill retention bonus under section section 355 of this title.1So in original.1

children.label: A
children.text: Special duty assignment pay under section 307 or 352 of this title.

children.label: B
children.text: Reenlistment bonus under .section 331 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: Enlistment bonus under .section 331 of this title

children.label: D
children.text: Career enlisted flyer incentive pay under section 320 or 353 of this title.

children.label: e
children.text: The clothing allowance under may not be considered in determining the amount of the pay and allowances of a grade formerly held by an officer if the officer is entitled to a uniform allowance under .section 418 of this titlesection 415 of this title
